content: productbuild --domains with enable_currentUserHome=true can theoretically let a .pkg install into the user's home directory without an admin password, but an Apple Developer Forums thread reports this is flaky/unreliable ('sometimes still asks for password'). Combined with .pkg's heavier Installer.app wizard UX being overkill for a single-folder copy, this pushes the recommendation away from .pkg entirely toward a lightweight app-based installer.
